allow: PowerShell(Get-Process python,ISCC,pyinstaller -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,CPU | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String; Write-Output "--- pyinstaller.log tail ---"; if\(Test-Path build_logs\\pyinstaller.log\){ Get-Content build_logs\\pyinstaller.log -Tail 12 } else { Write-Output "no pyinstaller.log" }; Write-Output "--- dist ---"; if\(Test-Path dist\\Project-On\){ \(Get-ChildItem dist\\Project-On -Recurse | Measure-Object\).Count; "exe exists: " + \(Test-Path dist\\Project-On\\Project-On.exe\) } else { Write-Output "dist not yet" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "--- inno_setup.log tail ---"; if\(Test-Path build_logs\\inno_setup.log\){ Get-Content build_logs\\inno_setup.log -Tail 20 } else { Write-Output "no inno log yet" }; Write-Output "--- Output dir ---"; if\(Test-Path installer\\Output\){ Get-ChildItem installer\\Output | Select-Object Name,@{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String } else { Write-Output "no Output yet" })
